# Registrar Destination Tracking Records

Source: **TRANSFERRED-STUDENTS-DESTINATION-TRACKING-RECORD.pdf** (NPS Registrar's
Office). Three related registers on separate pages. Header: **Naga Parochial School –
Registrar's Office**.

## 1. Transferred-Out Students Destination Tracking Record
Columns: `NO.` · `STUDENT NAME` · `LRN` · `GRADE/SECTION` · `DATE TRANSFERRED OUT` ·
`RECEIVING SCHOOL` · `SCHOOL ADDRESS` · `REASON FOR TRANSFER` · `REMARKS`.

**Reason for Transfer** picklist: Financial Difficulties · Relocation/Migration ·
Distance & Transportation · Academic Reasons · Change of Residence · Document Pending ·
Personal Preference.

**Remarks** picklist: Pending SF10 Request · SF10 Transmitted on ___ · Awaiting School Request.

## 2. School Leavers Tracking Record
Header adds: `SCHOOL YEAR COMPLETED: 2025-2026`.
Columns: `NO.` · `STUDENT NAME` · `LRN` · `GRADE/SECTION COMPLETED` · `RECEIVING SCHOOL` ·
`SCHOOL ADDRESS` · `REASON` · `REMARKS`.

**Reason** picklist: Financial Difficulties · Academic Problem · Change of
Residence/Migration · Personal Preference.

**Remarks** picklist: Verified through SF10 Request · Released SF10 · Pending Request ·
Confirmed Enrollment · Through Parents Interview/Information · Verified through Receiving
School · For Follow-up.

## 3. Graduates / Completer Destination Record
Columns: `NO.` · `STUDENT NAME` · `LRN` · `GRADE/SECTION COMPLETED` · `RECEIVING SCHOOL` ·
`SCHOOL ADDRESS` · `REASON` · `REMARKS`.

**Reason** picklist: Completed Terminal Grade (12) · Financial Difficulties · Change of
Residence/Migration · Personal Preference.

**Remarks** picklist: Grade 12 Graduate · Enrolled in another School · Released SF10 ·
Awaiting School Request · Pending Request.

## Summary block (all three)
`SUMMARY BY RECEIVING SCHOOL:` with `PRIVATE` / `PUBLIC` columns, one row per receiving
school (sample rows: ADNU=private, NCF=private, DEL ROSARIO HS=public).

> Cross-reference: the existing `/reports/tracking` report already covers this domain —
> align its columns and picklists with these official layouts.
